— session continuity file at repo root
Written by /handoff · Auto-read at SessionStart hook · Re-read at PreCompact hook · Survives context compression · Lives at repo root
12 agents · read-only · return findings · main thread applies · spawn via Agent tool or auto-invoked
Python scripts · cross-platform · configured by /setup-project-ai · hooks.json is the config source
inject_relay.py reads relay.md → injects full context
Global: warns if not on main branch
Re-reads relay.md so context survives compression
Runs lint + tests; blocks a red push
Lints silently; failures surface in next turn
The /ui-brief command is optional but important for UI phases. Run it before any
/tdd cycle that involves frontend work to lock font, colour, and animation choices first.
Hooks are per-project Python scripts. Run /setup-project-ai once to wire 4 hooks + the pre-push gate,
generate CLAUDE.md, and configure permissions. Hooks in hooks.json — not settings.template.json.
The /handoff command is manual. The relay.md reading at session start is automatic.
Always run /handoff before closing a session to avoid cold-start next time.
Agents return findings only — they do not edit code. Claude (main thread) applies their output.
